channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOGE Officially Concludes on Schedule, Leaving Victories and Memories of the Chainsaw
Elaine Chao Remains in China as McConnell Hospitalized, No Immediate Return Planned
item.description: Elaine Chao continued her planned trip to China while Mitch McConnell spent a third week in the hospital, fueling online speculation about his condition.

item.title: How Graham Platner's Campaign Collapsed: From Reddit Posts to Rape Allegation
item.description: Graham Platner's Maine Senate campaign faced a series of scandals, including a Nazi tattoo and sexting controversy, before a rape allegation emerged.

item.title: Former Jackson Mayor Pleads Guilty in Six-Figure Real Estate Bribery Scheme
item.description: Former Jackson Mayor Chokwe Antar Lumumba admitted to accepting $50,000 in campaign contributions from undercover FBI agents posing as developers.
